title: Add automatic fresh-context verifier agent workflow
summary: Implemented automatic fresh verifier stage for explicit task close: builds compact verifier prompt from task/context, spawns read-only `pi --mode json --no-session` with read/grep/find/ls tools, parses deterministic JSON verdict, appends verifier evidence, and blocks closure on non-pass; smoke tests disable nested verifier via env.
issues: Automatic verifier currently runs on explicit `codewiki_task` close; lifecycle `update` pass path remains a follow-up if strict auto-verify is required there too.
